steps.title: Identify the purpose shift
steps.content: The first two sentences define HGT and note where it occurs. The underlined sentence then pivots: it links the process to a concrete outcome—understanding HGT prevention could mitigate dangerous pathogens. This connection to practical significance is the key signal.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content:
The sentence establishes why studying this process matters by connecting it to a tangible benefit: preventing dangerous pathogens.

The other choices describe features not present in the text—a corrected misconception, research history, or organism comparison.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
